package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for table_name_override_or_scope_logic_duplicated_across_models: Repeated table-name or model-scope customization across many model files without a shared convention.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule198NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule198NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule198NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario198Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule198NegativeService, input Rule198NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
